content: He likes routine and worries about changes.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Gli piace la routine e si preoccupa dei cambiamenti
tok:ona li pali e ijo sama lon tenpo mute, la ni li pona tawa ona. ona li pali e ijo ante, la ni li ike tawa ona
